semantic.role: AST extraction rule definition for C/C++ language within the ArchSpine mirror system
responsibilities: Define patterns for identifying C/C++ imports, exports (functions, structs, variables), and usages (calls, field access, pointer field access)
Provide the structural mapping rules used by the scanner to extract symbolic information from source code
Maintain language-specific extraction syntax for code analysis and indexing
outOfScope: Other programming languages (e.g., TypeScript, Python, Rust) – those have separate rule files
High-level architectural policies or naming conventions
Runtime behavior or execution semantics beyond static analysis

English.purpose: This document defines the exact syntactic patterns that the ArchSpine scanner uses to recognize C/C++ code constructs such as functions, structs, variables, includes, and usage references. It acts as a language rule set for the AST extraction engine.
English.context_and_audience: Targeted at developers who maintain or extend the ArchSpine system's language support, particularly for C/C++ codebases. It is also consumed automatically by the scanner to perform static analysis and symbol extraction.
key_takeaways: Patterns use a YAML-based DSL with placeholders like $NAME, $RET, $ARGS
Exports map code structures to symbolic kinds (Function, Class, Variable) for the index
Usages capture how symbols are referenced (calls, field access) for dependency tracking

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 该文档定义了ArchSpine扫描器用来识别C/C++代码结构（如函数、结构体、变量、包含指令以及使用引用）的精确语法模式。它作为AST提取引擎的语言规则集。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 面向维护或扩展ArchSpine系统语言支持的开发者，特别是针对C/C++代码库。同时，它也会被扫描器自动读取，用于执行静态分析和符号提取。
key_takeaways: 模式使用基于YAML的DSL，包含$NAME、$RET、$ARGS等占位符
导出规则将代码结构映射到符号类型（函数、类、变量），以供索引使用
使用规则捕获符号如何被引用（调用、字段访问），用于依赖跟踪
